svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/146.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.6.6" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Página-1" id="gOK0X-EQB84G4pcCNzli"> <mxGraphModel dx="1895" dy="958" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{
 "data": "@startuml
' Orientación de izquierda a derecha
left to right direction
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

' Ajuste de colores para mantener tu estilo
skinparam usecase {
 BackgroundColor White
 BorderColor #1a4269
 ArrowColor #1a4269
}
skinparam actor {
 BackgroundColor White
 BorderColor #1a4269
}
skinparam database {
 BackgroundColor White
 BorderColor #1a4269
}
skinparam rectangle {
 BorderColor #1a4269
}

' Definición de los Actores
actor \"Administrador\" as admin
actor \"Operador\nde Carga\" as operador
database \"Sistema\" as db

' Límite del Sistema
rectangle \"Sistema ConsorCio+\" {
 
 ' Casos de Uso Principales
 usecase \"Iniciar Sesión\" as UC1
 usecase \"Gestionar Consorcio\" as UC2
 usecase \"Gestionar Unidades\nFuncionales\" as UC3
 usecase \"Gestionar\nPropietarios/Inquilinos\" as UC4
 usecase \"Ejecutar Liquidación\nMensual\" as UC5
 usecase \"Gestionar Reclamos\" as UC6
 usecase \"Generar Reportes\" as UC7
 usecase \"Registrar Gasto\" as UC8
 usecase \"Registrar Pago\nde Expensas\" as UC9
 
 ' Casos de Uso Secundarios (Includes / Extends)
 usecase \"Verificar\nPorcentuales\" as UC_VP
 usecase \"Generar Recibo\" as UC_GR
 usecase \"Aplicar Mora\nAutomática\" as UC_AMA

 ' Relaciones Include y Extend
 UC5 ..> UC_VP : <<include>>
 UC9 ..> UC_GR : <<include>>
 UC_AMA ..> UC9 : <<extend>>
}

' Asociaciones del Administrador
admin -- UC1
admin -- UC2
admin -- UC3
admin -- UC4
admin -- UC5
admin -- UC6
admin -- UC7

' Asociaciones del Operador de Carga
operador -- UC1
operador -- UC8
operador -- UC9
operador -- UC6

' Asociaciones del Sistema (Base de datos)
UC_VP -- db
UC_GR -- db

@enduml",
 "format": "svg"
}" id="jFLRT-Iyb0ZYsDBb88Fd-1"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="640" width="869.55" x="360" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

svg.style: width: 1019px; height: 750px; background: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-family: initial;
